title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Luffy, Kid as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.text: You didn't answer any of my questions back then...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
